$schema_note: Seed data for the 'categories' collection/table. One object per category; parent_id is null for top-level. default_access is the DEFAULT for new documents in that category (user can override per document). retention_rule and review_cycle are human-readable governance rules - indicative UK guidance, to be confirmed with insurers/legal before automating deletion.
business_context: UK plant & vehicle service, maintenance and repair business (Plantexpand Limited); mobile engineers, fixed sites and office staff.

reference_scheme.example: PEL-FIR-01-003 = the 3rd document ever filed under 03.01 Fire Risk Assessments
reference_scheme.rules: SEQ is a 3-digit per-subcategory counter allocated atomically by the system on document creation. References are immutable and never reused, even after disposal. A new version of a document KEEPS the same reference - versions are tracked in the document's version field. The reference never encodes anything that can change (site, year, owner, version).

categories.name: Policies & Governance
categories.description: Company-wide governing documents: how the business is run and what it commits to.

categories.name: Policies
categories.description: Formal policy statements signed off by senior management.
categories.typical_contents: H&S policy, environmental policy, quality policy, driving for work, lone working, drug & alcohol, equality & diversity, anti-bribery, whistleblowing

categories.name: Procedures
categories.description: Step-by-step processes that implement the policies.
categories.typical_contents: Incident reporting procedure, document control, purchasing, complaint handling, recruitment process

categories.name: Workplace Instructions
categories.description: Task-level instructions and safe operating instructions for specific equipment or activities.
categories.typical_contents: Vehicle lift operation, tyre bay procedures, battery charging, workshop equipment SOPs

categories.name: Handbooks
categories.description: Reference handbooks issued to staff and contractors.
categories.typical_contents: Employee handbook, driver handbook, subcontractor handbook

categories.name: Organisation & Responsibilities
categories.description: Who does what: structure charts and defined responsibilities.
categories.typical_contents: Org charts, role profiles, H&S responsibilities matrix, appointed persons (first aiders, fire wardens)

categories.name: Registers & Key Logs
categories.description: Master registers that keep the governance system under control.
categories.typical_contents: Legal & other requirements register, master document register, company risk register

categories.name: Business Continuity & Emergency Plans
categories.description: What happens when things go wrong: continuity and emergency response.
categories.typical_contents: Business continuity plan, emergency response plans, IT disaster recovery, out-of-hours arrangements

categories.name: Meeting Minutes & Management Review
categories.description: Records of governance meetings and ISO management reviews.
categories.typical_contents: H&S committee minutes, management review records, action logs

categories.name: Health & Safety
categories.description: Operational H&S documents covering workshops, mobile engineers and office staff.

categories.name: Risk Assessments
categories.description: General and task-based risk assessments.
categories.typical_contents: Workshop tasks, mobile/client-site work, manual handling, lone working, work in vehicle inspection pits, young persons, new & expectant mothers

categories.name: COSHH
categories.description: Hazardous substance assessments plus the safety data sheet (SDS) library.
categories.retention_rule: Current; 40 years where linked to exposure monitoring
categories.typical_contents: Oils & lubricants, fuels, solvents, brake cleaner, adhesives, welding fume, paints

categories.name: DSEAR Assessments
categories.description: Dangerous substances & explosive atmospheres assessments.
categories.typical_contents: Fuel storage & dispensing, battery charging areas, EV charging, damaged EV battery storage & quarantine, welding gases, paint spraying

categories.name: Method Statements & Safe Systems of Work
categories.description: How work is done safely, especially on client sites.
categories.retention_rule: Current + 3 years (contract life + 6 years if contractual)
categories.typical_contents: Method statements, RAMS packs, safe systems of work for service/maintenance/repair tasks

categories.name: Permits to Work
categories.description: Controlled permits for higher-risk activities.
categories.typical_contents: Hot works, confined spaces, working at height, live electrical / high-voltage EV work, isolations

categories.name: Checklists & Inspection Forms
categories.description: Blank and completed workplace checklists.
categories.typical_contents: Workshop housekeeping, ladder checks, racking inspections, site set-up checklists

categories.name: Incident Management
categories.description: Incident logs, reports and investigations.
categories.retention_rule: 3 years minimum (to age 21 if a minor); investigations 6 years
categories.typical_contents: Accident book/logs, near-miss reports, RIDDOR submissions, investigation reports, trend analysis

categories.name: Occupational Health
categories.description: Health surveillance for exposure risks - important for hand-tool heavy work.
categories.typical_contents: HAVS (vibration) surveillance, noise, respiratory checks, fit-for-work assessments, DSE eye tests

categories.name: First Aid & Welfare
categories.description: First aid provision and welfare arrangements.
categories.typical_contents: First aider register, kit check records, mental health first aiders, welfare facilities checks

categories.name: PPE Records
categories.description: PPE standards and issue records.
categories.typical_contents: PPE issue register, specification/standards, RPE face-fit test records

categories.name: H&S Site Visits
categories.description: Internal H&S inspection visits to depots and client sites.
categories.typical_contents: Site visit reports, inspection findings, action tracking

categories.name: General H&S
categories.description: H&S material not covered by a specific subcategory.
categories.typical_contents: HSE law poster info, signage packs, safety alerts & bulletins, campaign material

categories.name: DSE & Computer Users
categories.description: Display screen equipment compliance for office staff, homeworkers and anyone regularly on a computer.
categories.review_cycle: On start, on workstation change, then 2-yearly
categories.typical_contents: DSE workstation assessments (self-assessment + follow-up), homeworking assessments, eye test records & voucher scheme (clinical results stay in 02.08), DSE guidance for users

categories.name: Fire Safety
categories.description: Fire risk management for all premises.

categories.name: Fire Risk Assessments
categories.description: FRAs for each premises.
categories.review_cycle: Annual review; new FRA on significant change
categories.typical_contents: Fire risk assessments per depot/office, significant findings, action plans

categories.name: FRA Site Visits - Internal / External
categories.description: Visits that follow up or feed the FRA, by internal staff or external assessors.
categories.typical_contents: Internal fire checks, external assessor visit reports, action close-out evidence

categories.name: Fire Inspections & Testing
categories.description: Routine testing and servicing of fire systems and equipment.
categories.typical_contents: Weekly alarm tests, extinguisher servicing, emergency lighting tests, suppression system maintenance, fire logbooks

categories.name: Drills, Evacuation & PEEPs
categories.description: Evacuation planning and practice.
categories.review_cycle: Drills at least annually; plans on change
categories.typical_contents: Fire drill records, evacuation plans, assembly point maps, personal emergency evacuation plans (PEEPs)

categories.name: Statutory Compliance & Certificates
categories.description: Certificates and thorough-examination reports proving statutory compliance for premises, plant and equipment.

categories.name: Compliance Certificates (General)
categories.description: Central register and catch-all for statutory certificates, with an expiry tracker.
categories.typical_contents: Certificate tracker/register, premises compliance certificates not covered below

categories.name: Electrical Inspections (Fixed)
categories.description: Fixed electrical installation testing. (Portable appliance testing has its own subcategory, 04.12.)
categories.typical_contents: EICR fixed-wire testing (typically 5-yearly), electrical installation certificates, remedial works evidence

categories.name: EV & Charging Infrastructure
categories.description: Electric vehicle related inspections and authorisations.
categories.typical_contents: EV charge point inspection & maintenance records, high-voltage vehicle work authorisations, EV competence requirements

categories.name: Lifting Equipment (LOLER)
categories.description: Thorough examination reports for lifting equipment - core kit for a vehicle/plant workshop.
categories.typical_contents: Vehicle lifts, cranes, hoists, jacks, engine cranes, lifting accessories (6- or 12-monthly)

categories.name: Pressure Systems (PSSR)
categories.description: Written schemes of examination and reports for pressure systems.
categories.typical_contents: Compressors, air receivers, airline systems

categories.name: Local Exhaust Ventilation (LEV)
categories.description: Thorough examination and test of extraction systems.
categories.typical_contents: Welding fume extraction, vehicle exhaust extraction, dust extraction (14-monthly)

categories.name: Gas Safety
categories.description: Gas safety records for premises.
categories.typical_contents: Gas Safe service/inspection records for heating and appliances

categories.name: Asbestos
categories.description: Asbestos management for pre-2000 buildings.
categories.typical_contents: Management surveys, asbestos register, management plan, refurbishment/demolition surveys

categories.name: Legionella & Water Hygiene
categories.description: Water hygiene management where there are tanks, showers or deadlegs.
categories.typical_contents: Legionella risk assessments, temperature monitoring, flushing records

categories.name: Insurance
categories.description: Insurance certificates and policies.
categories.retention_rule: EL certificates: 40 years recommended; others 6 years
categories.typical_contents: Employers' liability (must be available to staff), public/products liability, motor fleet, engineering inspection policies

categories.name: Licences & Permits
categories.description: Operating licences and formal permissions.
categories.typical_contents: Operator's licence (if HGV), waste carrier registration, F-Gas certification (if AC work), trade accreditations

categories.name: PAT Testing
categories.description: Portable appliance testing across workshops, offices and mobile engineers' kit - split out because a workshop business has hundreds of portable items on different test frequencies.
categories.review_cycle: Risk-based: 3-12 months workshop kit; up to 24+ months low-risk office (HSE guidance)
categories.typical_contents: PAT registers & test results (110V workshop tools, extension leads, chargers, office equipment, van-carried tools), failed-item quarantine log

categories.name: Buildings & Premises Compliance
categories.description: Building-level statutory and regulatory documents for the premises you occupy.
categories.review_cycle: On change / lease events; condition surveys typically 5-yearly
categories.typical_contents: Building regulations approvals & completion certificates, planning permissions & conditions, lease compliance obligations, building condition surveys, occupancy/floor loading limits, Building Safety Act documentation if any premises are in scope

categories.name: Plant, Equipment & Maintenance
categories.description: Maintenance and asset records for your own premises, plant, tools and workshop equipment.

categories.name: Maintenance Records
categories.description: Planned and reactive maintenance for premises and equipment.
categories.typical_contents: PPM schedules, service & repair records, breakdown logs

categories.name: Asset Register
categories.description: What you own, where it is and when it needs inspecting.
categories.typical_contents: Plant, equipment & tool inventories with serials, locations and inspection frequencies

categories.name: Calibration Records
categories.description: Calibration of measuring and test equipment.
categories.typical_contents: Torque wrenches, diagnostic equipment, roller brake testers, test instruments, gas detection

categories.name: Pre-Use & Daily Checks
categories.description: Routine user checks on plant and equipment.
categories.typical_contents: Daily/weekly plant checks, forklift pre-use checks, tool inspections

categories.name: Fleet & Transport
categories.description: Your own vehicles and drivers - vans, service vehicles and any HGVs. (New category - a big risk area for a mobile workforce.)

categories.name: Vehicle Records
categories.description: Per-vehicle compliance files.
categories.typical_contents: MOT certificates, service history, insurance, tax status per vehicle

categories.name: Daily Walkaround & Defect Reports
categories.description: Driver daily checks and defect rectification.
categories.typical_contents: Walkaround check records, defect reports, rectification evidence

categories.name: Driver Compliance
categories.description: Driver checks and driver risk management.
categories.typical_contents: DVLA licence checks, eyesight checks, driver risk assessments, driver training

categories.name: O-Licence & Tachograph
categories.description: Operator licence compliance (if you run HGVs).
categories.retention_rule: Tacho data 12 months; working time records 2 years
categories.typical_contents: O-licence documents, tachograph downloads & analysis, drivers' hours records

categories.name: Driving for Work & Grey Fleet
categories.description: Business driving in employees' own vehicles.
categories.typical_contents: Grey-fleet checks (business insurance, MOT), driving for work assessments

categories.name: Audits, ISO & Accreditations
categories.description: Audit programme and evidence for ISO standards and other accreditations.

categories.name: ISO Evidence
categories.description: Evidence packs for your ISO management systems.
categories.typical_contents: ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 / 27001 evidence, objectives & KPIs, context & interested parties, Statement of Applicability (27001)

categories.name: Internal Audits
categories.description: Your own audit programme.
categories.typical_contents: Audit schedule, internal audit reports, findings & actions

categories.name: External Audits & Certification
categories.description: Certification body visits and your certificates.
categories.typical_contents: Certification body (UKAS) reports, certificates of registration, surveillance visit reports

categories.name: Non-Conformance & Corrective Actions
categories.description: Tracking and fixing what audits and incidents find.
categories.typical_contents: NCR log, root-cause analyses, corrective & preventive action (CAPA) tracking

categories.name: Client & Third-Party Audits
categories.description: Audits of you by clients and accreditation schemes.
categories.typical_contents: Client audit reports, PQQ responses, contractor accreditation assessments (e.g. SafeContractor/CHAS if held)

categories.name: Environment & Sustainability
categories.description: Environmental compliance and carbon/sustainability reporting.

categories.name: Utility Bills & Energy Data
categories.description: Consumption evidence used for Planet Mark and ISO reporting.
categories.typical_contents: Gas/electricity/water bills, meter readings, fuel usage records

categories.name: Carbon Reporting & Planet Mark
categories.description: Carbon footprint measurement and certification.
categories.typical_contents: Planet Mark submissions & certificates, footprint calculations, reduction plans

categories.name: Waste Management
categories.description: Waste duty-of-care records - significant for a workshop business.
categories.retention_rule: Consignment notes 3 years; transfer notes 2 years
categories.typical_contents: Hazardous waste consignment notes (waste oil, batteries, tyres, filters, solvents), waste transfer notes, contractor carrier registrations

categories.name: Environmental Aspects & Spill Response
categories.description: Environmental risk management (ISO 14001).
categories.typical_contents: Aspects & impacts register, spill response plans, spill kit checks, environmental incident records

categories.name: HR & Employment
categories.description: Employment guidance, HR templates and onboarding. Keep individual personnel files in the HR system, not this shared library.

categories.name: Employment Law
categories.description: Employment law guidance and updates.
categories.typical_contents: Legal guidance notes, legislation updates, ACAS guidance

categories.name: HR Policies, Forms & Templates
categories.description: Blank HR documents for managers and staff.
categories.typical_contents: Contract templates, disciplinary & grievance forms, absence forms, appraisal templates

categories.name: Recruitment & Onboarding
categories.description: Bringing people in properly.
categories.typical_contents: Right-to-work checklist, induction packs, probation forms, starter checklists

categories.name: Training & Competence
categories.description: Training materials, delivery records and competence evidence.

categories.name: eLearning Modules
categories.description: Online modules, organised by subject.
categories.typical_contents: Subjects from your list: Health & Safety, Employment Law, Data Protection & GDPR, Building Safety Act, ISO awareness; plus manual handling, fire awareness, COSHH

categories.name: Training Presentations
categories.description: Slide decks for instructor-led training. (Appeared twice on your list - merged.)
categories.typical_contents: Induction decks, technical training, refresher courses

categories.name: Toolbox Talks
categories.description: Short safety briefings plus delivery/attendance records.
categories.typical_contents: TBT library by topic, delivery schedule, attendance sheets

categories.name: Factsheets
categories.description: One-page quick-reference guidance.
categories.typical_contents: Topic factsheets, quick-reference cards

categories.name: Training Records & Certificates
categories.description: Proof of who is trained and competent to do what.
categories.typical_contents: Training matrix, attendance records, competence certificates (forklift, F-Gas, IMI EV levels, first aid, IOSH/NEBOSH)

categories.name: Inductions
categories.description: Induction content and completion records.
categories.typical_contents: New-starter induction, depot/site inductions, contractor inductions

categories.name: Data Protection & Information Security
categories.description: UK GDPR compliance and information security (ISO 27001).

categories.name: Data Protection (UK GDPR)
categories.description: Data protection compliance documents.
categories.typical_contents: Privacy notices, DPIAs, record of processing activities (ROPA), retention schedule, subject access request procedure

categories.name: Information Security (ISO 27001)
categories.description: InfoSec policies and registers.
categories.typical_contents: Information security policies, acceptable use, access control, information asset register, supplier security assessments

categories.name: Breach & Security Incident Log
categories.description: What went wrong and what was reported.
categories.typical_contents: Personal-data breach register, security incident reports, ICO notification records

categories.name: Resources & Reference
categories.description: General reference material and the blank forms library.

categories.name: Templates & Blank Forms
categories.description: Central library of blank forms and templates for every category.
categories.typical_contents: Blank RA/COSHH templates, report templates, letterheads, branded documents

categories.name: External Guidance & Standards
categories.description: Third-party reference material.
categories.typical_contents: HSE guidance (INDG/HSG series), industry body guidance, standards copies, legislation summaries

categories.name: Contractors & Suppliers
categories.description: Vetting and controlling the people who work for you. (New category - closes a common audit gap.)

categories.name: Approved Supplier & Subcontractor Register
categories.description: Who is approved to work for you and until when.
categories.typical_contents: Approved lists with approval status and expiry dates

categories.name: Subcontractor RAMS & Insurances
categories.description: Evidence subcontractors are safe and insured.
categories.typical_contents: Subcontractor RAMS, insurance certificates, competence evidence

categories.name: Supplier Assessments & PQQs
categories.description: Vetting and performance monitoring.
categories.typical_contents: Pre-qualification questionnaires, vetting assessments, performance reviews
